metadata.og:title:
Ukraine Control Map on X: "End of month Ukraine map thread 🧵 for March 2026 

Today, rather than focusing on specific units, we're looking at the distribution of geolocations.

The map below shows all recorded March geolocations across Ukraine, excluding deep strikes inside Russia. As expected, activity https://t.co/fUIXBt7VQC" / X
